ast: approx_count_distinct(a)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------+
| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | UInt64([2, 2])              |
+--------+-----------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(to_float64(0.5))(a)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------+
| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | UInt64([2, 2])              |
+--------+-----------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(b)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------+
| Column | Data                         |
+--------+------------------------------+
| b      | Column(UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4])) |
| Output | UInt64([2, 2])               |
+--------+------------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(s)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+----------------------------------+
| Column | Data                             |
+--------+----------------------------------+
| s      | Column(StringColumn[a, b, a, c]) |
| Output | UInt64([1, 2])                   |
+--------+----------------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(date_col)
evaluation (internal):
+----------+----------------------------+
| Column   | Data                       |
+----------+----------------------------+
| date_col | Column(Date([1, 2, 1, 3])) |
| Output   | UInt64([1, 2])             |
+----------+----------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(ts)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                |
+--------+-------------------------------------+
| ts     | Column(Timestamp([10, 20, 10, 30])) |
| Output | UInt64([1, 2])                      |
+--------+-------------------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(parse_json(json))
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                  |
+--------+-------------------------------------------------------+
| json   | Column(StringColumn[{"k":1}, {"k":2}, {"k":1}, null]) |
| Output | UInt64([1, 2])                                        |
+--------+-------------------------------------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(null)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------+
| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | UInt64([0, 0])              |
+--------+-----------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(x_null)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                            |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| x_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 2, 3]), validity: [0b____1101] }) |
| Output | UInt64([2, 1])                                                                  |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: approx_count_distinct(all_null)
evaluation (internal):
+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column   | Data                                                                            |
+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| all_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0000] }) |
| Output   | UInt64([0, 0])                                                                  |
+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
